scenarios.name: a ledger entry is visible only to its sitter and parent, and insert forces the sitter to be the caller

steps.sql: INSERT INTO app_babysitting_coop__ledger_entries (id, sitter_id, sitter_name, parent_id, parent_name, minutes, occurred_on, created_at) VALUES ('l1', ?, 'Sitter', ?, 'Parent', 90, '2026-01-01', '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z')
SELECT sitter_id FROM app_babysitting_coop__ledger_entries WHERE id = 'l1'
SELECT id FROM app_babysitting_coop__ledger_entries WHERE id = 'l1'
SELECT id FROM app_babysitting_coop__ledger_entries WHERE id = 'l1'

scenarios.name: confirmed minutes are frozen in the endpoint_only agreements table, are adult-only to read, and cannot be edited by shifting the ledger entry

steps.sql: INSERT INTO app_babysitting_coop__ledger_entries (id, sitter_id, sitter_name, parent_id, parent_name, minutes, occurred_on, created_at) VALUES ('l1', ?, 'Sitter', ?, 'Parent', 90, '2026-01-01', '2026-01-01T00:00:00Z')

INSERT INTO app_babysitting_coop__ledger_agreements (id, sitter_id, parent_id, sitter_agreed, parent_agreed, status, locked_at, updated_at, minutes) VALUES ('l1', ?, ?, 1, 1, 'locked', '2026-01-02T00:00:00Z', '2026-01-02T00:00:00Z', 90)
UPDATE app_babysitting_coop__ledger_entries SET minutes = 999 WHERE id = 'l1'
SELECT minutes FROM app_babysitting_coop__ledger_agreements WHERE id = 'l1'
SELECT minutes FROM app_babysitting_coop__ledger_agreements WHERE id = 'l1'
UPDATE app_babysitting_coop__ledger_agreements SET minutes = 999 WHERE id = 'l1'
